## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.2

### 📷 Cameras
- Prevents Home Assistant's WebRTC provider probe from starting an X-Sense live session during camera entity setup unless the experimental WebRTC bridge option is enabled.
- Keeps the default camera stream path separate from the experimental WebRTC bridge path.
- Handles X-Sense `DEVICE_NO_RESPONSE` start-live failures without breaking camera entity setup.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for default provider probing, experimental bridge provider probing, and start-live no-response handling.
- Confirms the full Python test suite and the Go bridge test pass with these changes.
